hero.description: Admins, doctors, and assistants use the same secure entry point. After authentication, the backend resolves identity, permissions, and destination automatically.

no_role_picker.title: No role picker
no_role_picker.subtitle: The backend routes each user to the correct workspace.

shared_session.title: Shared session control
shared_session.subtitle: Protected navigation, persistent sessions, one logout path.

responsive.title: Responsive by design
responsive.subtitle: Optimized for phones, laptops, and wide desktop screens.

admin.title: Admin command center
admin.subtitle: System oversight, user governance, and institutional workflows.

doctor.title: Doctor teaching workspace
doctor.subtitle: Course delivery, content operations, and teaching intelligence.

assistant.title: Assistant operations lane
assistant.subtitle: Day-to-day academic coordination with the right scoped access.

form.description: Sign in with your university account to continue to the right workspace.
form.info: Admins, doctors, and assistants now use one login form. Permissions and destination are assigned by the backend after authentication.
form.developer_description: Create a local test session without changing the production login flow.

forgot_password.title: Reset password
forgot_password.description: Enter your university email to request a reset link.
forgot_password.success: If the account exists, a reset request has been submitted.

inactive.title: Account inactive
inactive.description: {account} is currently inactive. Contact your administrator to restore access.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized
unauthorized.anonymous: You do not have access to this area.
unauthorized.with_role: Your role "{role}" does not have access to this route.
